author: IGN YouTube
text:
ReStory: Chill Electronics Repairs - 20 Minutes of Gameplay
ReStory: Chill Electronics Repairs is part of the "cozy" genre as it's a mix of Unpacking and something like TGC Card Simulator. You repair Y2K-era devices in your small shop, trying to stay on top of your bills while interacting with other locals. ReStory is being developed by Mandragora Studios, and you can download the demo now as part of Steam Next Fest.

#IGN #Gaming

author: IGN YouTube
text:
7 Burning Questions for the GTA 6 Pre-Order Launch - IGN Daily Fix
GTA 6 is coming! Rockstar has confirmed that pre-orders go live on June 25, which means we’re just a week away from finally getting some meaningful answers on what to expect when the most anticipated video game of all time arrives this November.
Once pre-orders open, we can expect to get answers for some of the biggest questions from not just fans, but the entire video game industry. With GTA 6, Rockstar has perhaps the biggest entertainment launch ever on its hands. This is a huge moment for the industry. What Rockstar and parent company Take-Two do in November could be a reset moment for video games, and setting up rival publishers to follow suit.
Here are seven burning questions for the pre-order reveal.
Presented by Universal Orlando Resort, and its newest theme park, Universal Epic Universe.

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Order of the Sinking Star - 12 Minutes of Gameplay From Jonathan Blow's Next Puzzle Adventure
Order of the Sinking Star is the next game from Jonathan Blow, creator of Braid and The Witness. This time around you have rewind powers similar to the ones in Braid, and you're now controlling three characters as you solve puzzle after puzzle to progress through the overworld. You can download the demo now as part of Steam Next Fest.

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Aniimo - Official Gameplay Showcase
Don't miss the Gameplay Showcase for Aniimo, an upcoming free-to-play creature-collecting game developed by Pawprint Studio. Players will explore a vibrant world to seek unique Aniimo, learn new abilities, and embark on an epic journey. Take a look at gameplay, including cinematic cutscenes, gameplay, and more in Aniimo, coming soon to PlayStation 5 (PS5), Xbox Series X|S, iOS, Android, and PC (Steam and Epic Games Store).

#IGN #Gaming

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Embers of the Uncrowned - 11 Minutes of Questing Gameplay
Embers of the Uncrowned is an isometric MMORPG with PvP elements, town-building elements, and dungeon runs. It is being developed by Nexon, and you can download the demo now as part of Steam Next Fest.

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Casualties: Unknown - Full Run Gameplay
Get a feel for the upcoming survival sim, Casualties: Unknown, in this look at 16 minutes of gameplay, covering a full run from start to death. You can download the demo now via Steam Next Fest, with the full game being planned to release in 2026.

#ign #gaming

author: IGN YouTube
text:
GTA 6: The Road to Launch
Now that the cover art and pre-order date have finally been revealed in a new GTA 6 trailer, we dive into the what the road to November 19th looks like.   

We discuss GTA VI delays, special editions, launch times, price and what we can expect to see next. Will Rockstar show a GTA VI preview next? Gameplay? Only time will tell, but IGN will be here to breakdown all the GTA news!

#GTA6 #GrandTheftAuto6 #ign #gaming

author: IGN YouTube
text:
EMPULSE - 6 Minutes of Multiplayer Demo Gameplay (Full Match)
EMPULSE is a 6v6 FPS that is trying to capture the feel of Titanfall, complete with wall running and mechs. 1047 Games previously developed the Splitgate franchise. It hits Steam Early Access on June 24. You can download the demo now as part of Steam Next Fest.
